artifact-01.one_line: Strongest, most honest interface (typed PaginatedResponse + IngestResult, required non-null fields, batch repo hydration with no N+1); weakest is thinner read-path edge coverage (no orphan/no-link or missing-field-in-list test) and in-page-only link resolution.

artifact-02.one_line: Strongest is genuine out-of-page ref-based in_repo resolution; weakest is pervasive fabricated fallback defaults (owner:"", number:0, title:remote_id) that write malformed rows instead of dropping them by name, violating the no-fallback rule.

artifact-03.one_line: Strongest is exhaustive, honest test coverage (7 ingest + 5 read incl empty page, no-link→null, missing-field, malformed repo/issue) with clean fallback-free helpers; weakest is a plain {items,total} interface with no pagination echo and in-page-only linking.

artifact-04.one_line: Strongest is a state enum plus a richer typed get result (nested repository {id,name}) resolved via a single list_linked; weakest is deviating from the specified repository_name shape and nullable read-path str??null fallbacks over an already-validated facet.

artifact-05.one_line: Strongest is the most robust ingest — out-of-page ref resolution, state-validated drop-by-name, byte-equal idempotence and constant-count reads; weakest is storing the raw payload (incl entity_type) in the facet rather than the narrowed contract.

artifact-06.one_line: Strongest is exact, high-signal fixture assertions (precise entity/link sets) with named-error drop-by-name and a batch get_entities repo read; weakest is in-page-only linking and storing the raw payload rather than the designed facet fields.

artifact-07.one_line: Strongest is the only serious canonical-property modeling (facet mappings + mergeable) plus out-of-page refs; weakest is a read path that silently defaults title to "" and lighter tests with no malformed-drop or missing-field cases.

artifact-08.one_line: Strongest is a workable two-pass ingest; weakest is a pile of small defects — fallback defaults instead of dropping, a nonstandard schema "entity" key, repo_name naming that breaks from the spec, and speculative unused payload fields.

artifact-09.one_line: Strongest is a careful get path that validates the repository schema and names every missing field; weakest is only partial ingest validation (requires just title/name, so an issue missing state/number/created_at still lands) and just two ingest tests.

artifact-10.one_line: Strongest is engaging canonical mappings; weakest is a real modeling flaw — created_at is nullable and dropped from required yet is the newest-first sort key — plus partial ingest validation and nullable read fallbacks.

artifact-11.one_line: Strongest is the most complete package — Parsed<T> field-naming errors, projected repo read, PaginatedResponse with echoed paging, and the broadest tests (all-malformed guard, empty remote_id, orphan, in_repo→non-repo); weakest is in-page-only linking with no out-of-page ref fallback.
